question.title: Should I configure sessionManagement in HttpSecurity if I use Spring Session?
question.body:
I am trying to understand how Spring Security and Spring Session projects work together. In my project I want to save sessions into database that's why I am using Spring Session JDBC. But I can't understand should I configure something in @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) in part sessionManagement. For example I've tried to set maximum user sessions by

@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) {
    http
        .sessionManagement(session -> session
            .maximumSessions(1)
        );
    return http.build();
}

and there is no affect. Can someone explain why there is no affect and should I configure sessionManagement in HttpSecurity ?
